title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repository: get up and running with Llama 3.1, Mistral, Gemma 2, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Ollama, published on npm as ‘ollama’.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama, available on PyPI as ‘ollama’.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package (PyPI: langchain-ollama) letting you use Ollama models as LLMs, embeddings, and tool callers inside LangChain.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (Docker-ready) with chat history, model management, and multi-user support.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Interactive TUI for Ollama written in Go, offering model search, chat, and parameter tuning without leaving the terminal.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that turns any Ollama model into a GitHub-Copilot-like inline assistant.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/JVM client for Ollama (Maven Central: io.github.ollama4j) with Kotlin extensions.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Community-maintained Rust crate (crates.io: ollama-rs) providing strongly-typed bindings to the Ollama REST API.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET client for Ollama (NuGet: OllamaSharp) supporting .NET 6+ and Unity.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration by deepset-ai, exposing Ollama models as generators and embedders in Haystack pipelines.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU autoscaling.

title: ollama-gui
summary: Lightweight Flutter desktop app that talks to Ollama over REST, packaged for Windows, macOS, and Linux.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module that spins up Ollama containers for CI pipelines so you can unit-test LLM prompts.

title: ollama discord bot
summary: Self-hostable Discord bot that lets servers chat with any Ollama model via slash commands.

title: ollama-elixir
summary: Elixir wrapper (Hex.pm: ollama_ex) for Ollama with GenServer-backed connection pooling.

title: ollama-sdks
summary: Community umbrella repo collecting unofficial SDKs for Dart, PHP, Swift, and Ruby.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin that adds an “Ollama” command to summarize notes, brainstorm, or continue writing using a local model.

title: ollama-nix
summary: Nix flake that builds Ollama with CUDA and ROCm variants plus a module for NixOS deployment.

title: ollama-rag-chatbot
summary: End-to-end RAG template using Ollama for both embeddings and generation, Chroma as vector DB, and Streamlit for the UI.
